responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix the IVX Owner AI chat room end to end: resolve the Vercel AI Gateway 401 authentication failure, implement provider fallback, sanitize UI errors, and deploy to production ‚Äî per the user's FINAL BLOCK directive.

## Constraints & Preferences
- User explicitly rejects Swift: app is React Native (native) from day one
- Keep the Expo/React Native app in `expo/`
- `createApp` for `react-native` is hard-rejected by the platform (Swift project origin)
- User explicitly rejected creating a separate web preview app
- Canonical GitHub repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public, created March 1, 2026)
- Backend live at `api.ivxholding.com`, landing at `ivxholding.com`, chat at `chat.ivxholding.com`
- User demands: no raw stack traces in UI, structured server-side logging, real test proof
- User's FINAL BLOCK directive: audit whether Vercel AI Gateway is required; if NOT required, remove it and route directly to the configured AI provider; if required, verify key/team/header; then test owner-room end-to-end and deploy
- User does NOT have an OpenAI API key ‚Äî only Vercel access
- User prefers doing Render dashboard changes on their phone

## Progress
### Done
- Deep audit: 111 backend API modules, 273 backend services, 254 app screens, 51 components ‚Äî TypeScript compiles with 0 errors
- Render repo repoint completed: was pinned to deleted `rork-ivxholding--1`, repointed to `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`; deploy `dep-d981qea8qa3s73b0gpp0` went live
- Production commit match verified: GitHub SHA `dcbf86fa` = Render SHA = `/health` SHA = `/version` SHA
- Owner auth verified live: `GET /api/ivx/owner-auth/diagnostic` ‚Üí 200, `authProxyActive: true`, Supabase connected; bad-creds probe ‚Üí HTTP 401
- Enterprise guard bug found: 28 handlers in `backend/api/ivx-enterprise-orchestrator.ts` call `assertIVXOwnerOnly(req)` without await ‚Üí unhandled rejection ‚Üí crash ‚Üí 502
- Enterprise guard fix written locally: added `requireEnterpriseOwner` async helper, replaced all 28 bare calls, compiles ‚Äî not yet deployed
- Full 100-module breakdown delivered
- CRM verified present: `ivx-investor-crm.ts` (291 lines), `ivx-crm-dedup.ts` (313 lines), `ivx-lead-scoring.ts`, `ivx-deal-tracking.ts`
- GitHub repo timeline verified: created March 1, 2026, 143 commits, last push July 9, 2026
- Workspace synced with GitHub repo ‚Äî only 1 diff: `expo/package.json` (SDK patch bumps)
- `expo-env.d.ts` restored from GitHub
- Cloudflare Worker provisioned at `ivx26-backend.rork.app` ‚Äî enhanced with `env-check`, `gateway-test`, `render-test`, `render-set-ai-key` actions; codeId `072e8503e0f42c7cb70352d7cc6733f1` deployed
- Expo SDK patches fixed: `expo` 54.0.35, `expo-file-system` 19.0.23, `expo-font` 14.0.12, `expo-router` 6.0.24
- `bun install` successful: 1028 packages
- `expo-doctor` passed all project checks
- Metro bundler: web export 3,719 modules, 13.8 MB, zero errors; iOS bundle 4,235 modules, 9.7 MB, zero errors
- Expo Go QR tunnel set up and live: `exp://easy-humans-sing.loca.lt` (Metro port 8081)
- Render `GET /health` ‚Üí HTTP 200, serving commit `dcbf86f`
- **AI gateway auth fix implemented (4 files, compiled, 787/789 tests pass, 0 TS errors in changed files)**:
  - `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts`: `auth` failures now retryable across providers; `Unauthenticated`/`invalid api key`/`ai_gateway_api_key` patterns added to `classifyProviderFailure`
  - `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts`: missing gateway key no longer hard-throws before fallback chain runs; `hasGatewayKey` gate skips gateway loop when key absent; streaming path returns clean error chunk instead of crashing; timestamps added to failure logs; **NEW: runtime key hydration from Owner Variables store** ‚Äî `hydrateGatewayApiKeyFromOwnerVariables()` reads `AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY` from encrypted Owner Variables at request time with 60s TTL cache, lazy dynamic import avoids module cycles; both non-streaming (line 332) and streaming paths call `await hydrateGatewayApiKeyFromOwnerVariables()`
  - `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts`: raw stack traces/origin frames removed from UI forever; chat bubble shows "IVX AI is temporarily unavailable. Retrying securely."; full diagnostics kept server-side as structured logs; `providerError` client payload reduced to `{isTimeout, isGatewayFailure, errorName, status, retriable}` ‚Äî no stack, no message, no origin
  - `backend/api/ivx-autonomy.ts`: fallback trigger list updated to include `'auth'`
- **Old Vercel AI Gateway key proven dead (401)**:
  - `vck_7GQq62HpTWSSXwCcCJgbKkErpQ51RSJFtA7kHINJs29FVa5K9B3bHTYQ` (60 chars) ‚Üí 401 "Authentication failed" from both `/v1/credits` and `/v1/chat/completions`
- **User's `vcp_` token identified as Vercel account token** (not AI Gateway key):
  - `vcp_1UWzfu1up7xx9gRXsSZxjAsNzYdzcIEXUuf4wUPfpQCyCjPYOX1hjUKO` (60 chars) ‚Üí 401 on AI Gateway endpoints BUT 200 on `api.vercel.com/v2/user` (Vercel platform API); user email `osconstructors@gmail.com`, team `team_fEfCJAenMBXVSGiX6LeoA3Ji`, plan `hobby`
- **NEW working AI Gateway key created via Vercel API**:
  - Used `vcp_` token to call `POST https://api.vercel.com/v1/api-keys?teamId=team_fEfCJAenMBXVSGiX6LeoA3Ji` with `{"name":"ivx-backend","purpose":"ai-gateway"}` ‚Üí HTTP 200, returned `vck_4n9CysTGQ3VddneVh9wNjwYtirJ85e9bMJY5iQ628ONJVsQwXh0QNCf6`
  - New key verified live: `GET /v1/credits` ‚Üí HTTP 200 `{"balance":"422.30943735","total_used":"82.69056265"}` (‚âà$422 credits); `POST /v1/chat/completions` ‚Üí HTTP 200 real model response from `openai/gpt-4o`
  - Key ID: `2PlCFw5G1Pl9PAg2urHRze5mB5BT3TZEyabpCiPEG0bgClFf`, created by user `damqYtG3W8C1l6wIUMpsy5qb`
- **Production server restarted**: bootTime changed from `2026-07-10T11:37:05Z` to `2026-07-10T15:33:55Z` ‚Äî user did make a Render change
- **BUT chat still returns `source: "fallback"`**: `/api/public/chat` returns canned answer, not real AI ‚Äî the new key may not have been pasted into the correct Environment Variable field; `gatewayKeyPresent: true` reported by `/api/ivx/owner-ai/proxy-status` but gateway still failing

### In Progress
- **Getting the new working key onto Render correctly**: user accidentally pasted key into "Secret Files" section instead of Environment Variables; was guided to scroll up to the KEY/VALUE table, edit `AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY` row, paste `vck_4n9CysTGQ3VddneVh9wNjwYtirJ85e9bMJY5iQ628ONJVsQwXh0QNCf6`, and Save Changes; server restarted but chat still shows fallback ‚Äî need to verify key was placed in the right field

### Blocked
- **New key not yet properly bound on Render**: server restarted (bootTime changed) but chat still returns `source: fallback` ‚Äî key was likely pasted in wrong section (Secret Files) or old key value wasn't replaced; user needs to verify `AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY` env var has the new `vck_4n9...` value
- **`RENDER_API_KEY` still not available**: requested from user but not provided; cannot programmatically set env var or trigger deploy via API
- **`OPENAI_API_KEY` not available**: user confirmed "I not have openAi key" ‚Äî direct OpenAI fallback cannot be configured
- **Code fixes not deployed to production**: 4-file fix (including owner variable hydration) is local only; needs GitHub push ‚Üí Render auto-deploy
- **`createApp` for react-native rejected**: platform hard limit (Swift project origin)
- **`runChecks` on expo fails**: "No app found at 'expo'. Available app paths: 'ios' (swift), 'functions' (cloudflare)."
- **Enterprise guard fix not deployed**: local only, rides next sync

## Key Decisions
- `auth` failures are now retryable across providers ‚Äî a dead gateway key instantly fails over to OpenAI/Anthropic direct when configured
- Raw provider errors are NEVER sent to the UI again ‚Äî full diagnostics stay in server logs only
- Runtime key hydration from Owner Variables store added ‚Äî key rotation from the owner app takes effect without a Render redeploy (60s TTL cache, lazy dynamic import to avoid cycles)
- Vercel AI Gateway KEPT (not removed) ‚Äî user has $422 in credits and a working key; direct provider routing not viable without OpenAI/Anthropic keys
- New AI Gateway key created programmatically via Vercel API using user's `vcp_` account token ‚Äî the `vcp_` prefix is a Vercel platform token, not an AI Gateway key; AI Gateway keys always start with `vck_`
- Enterprise guard fix uses same try/catch + await pattern as working `ivx-owner-variables.ts` handlers

## Next Steps
- **Verify the new key is in the correct Render Environment Variable field**: user may have pasted into Secret Files instead; guide them to the KEY/VALUE table, edit `AI_GATEWAY_API_KEY`, paste `vck_4n9CysTGQ3VddneVh9wNjwYtirJ85e9bMJY5iQ628ONJVsQwXh0QNCf6`, Save Changes
- **Re-test production after correct key binding**: check `bootTime` changes again, then `POST /api/public/chat` should return `source: "ai"` with a real model response
- **Deploy code fixes to production**: push 4-file fix (including owner variable hydration) to GitHub ‚Üí Render auto-deploy; or use Render API if key is provided
- **Test owner-room end-to-end**: verify assistant replies, conversation persistence, realtime updates, reload recovery
- **Provide required proof A‚ÄìK**: root cause, gateway kept/removed, active provider, active model, runtime var binding, HTTP result, successful owner-room conversation, GitHub commit SHA, Render deploy ID, `/health` = 200, screenshot
- Deploy enterprise guard fix (rides auto-deploy pipeline on next sync)

## Critical Context
- Workspace project ID: `h664fqwph5y1q3kpwevcn` (Swift project ‚Äî cannot preview React Native)
- GitHub canonical repo: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest` (public, 143 commits)
- Latest GitHub HEAD: `dcbf86fa5f2345991cc1c41556dad75349abe3e8` ‚Äî matches live backend
- Render service ID: `srv-d7t9ivreo5us73ftose0` (ivx-holdings-platform)
- Render service URL: `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com`
- Supabase URL: `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co` (GoTrue v2.192.0 healthy)
- Expo SDK 54.0.35, bundle ID `com.ivxholdings.app`, scheme `ivx-app`
- Expo Go tunnel: `exp://easy-humans-sing.loca.lt` (Metro port 8081) ‚Äî may need restart
- Vercel team ID: `team_fEfCJAenMBXVSGiX6LeoA3Ji`; user: `osconstructors@gmail.com`; plan: `hobby`
- **Working AI Gateway key**: `vck_4n9CysTGQ3VddneVh9wNjwYtirJ85e9bMJY5iQ628ONJVsQwXh0QNCf6` ‚Äî verified HTTP 200, $422 credits, real completion from `openai/gpt-4o`
- **Dead AI Gateway key**: `vck_7GQq62HpTWSSXwCcCJgbKkErpQ51RSJFtA7kHINJs29FVa5K9B3bHTYQ` ‚Äî 401 on all endpoints
- **User's Vercel account token**: `vcp_1UWzfu1up7xx9gRXsSZxjAsNzYdzcIEXUuf4wUPfpQCyCjPYOX1hjUKO` ‚Äî valid for Vercel API, NOT for AI Gateway
- Production bootTime: `2026-07-10T15:33:55.660Z` (restarted after user's Render change, but chat still in fallback mode)
- `/api/ivx/owner-ai/proxy-status` reports `gatewayKeyPresent: true` but chat still returns `source: fallback`
- `backend/ivx-ai-runtime.ts`: `hydrateGatewayApiKeyFromOwnerVariables()` added after `getIVXAIGatewayApiKey()` (line ~155); 60s TTL cache via `ownerVariableKeyCache`; lazy `import('./api/ivx-owner-variables')` to avoid cycles; called at line ~332 (non-streaming) and streaming path
- `backend/services/ivx-ai-provider-fallback.ts`: fallback chain `vercel_ai_gateway` ‚Üí `openai_direct` ‚Üí `anthropic_direct`; `isFailureRetryable()` now includes `'auth'`
- `backend/api/ivx-owner-ai.ts`: error catch sanitized ‚Äî `visibleAnswer` is canned string, not raw error; `providerError` client payload has no stack/message/origin
- `backend/api/ivx-autonomy.ts`: `fallbackTriggersOnly` array updated to include `'auth'`
- Cloudflare Worker `functions/index.ts`: enhanced with env-check, gateway-test, render-test, render-set-ai-key actions; codeId `072e8503e0f42c7cb70352d7cc6733f1`
- Rork proxy skill (`.
